title: KPI Dashboard With Stat Cards
description: ARCHETYPE: dashboard. Shape: ONE app shell page with sidebar navigation, page header, routed tabs, and a stat strip containing 4 stat cards. The core primitive is stat strip + stat card, not hand-built metric_card sections. Include a seed endpoint so tests have data.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend and web

create a Deals table:
  title, required
  amount (number), required
  status, required
  created_at, auto

when user sends seed to /api/seed:
  create d1:
    title is 'Acme renewal'
    amount = 12000
    status is 'pending'
  save d1 as new Deal
  create d2:
    title is 'Globex expansion'
    amount = 24000
    status is 'approved'
  save d2 as new Deal
  send back 'seeded'

# Build a shell dashboard at / with this exact KPI syntax:
# stat strip:
#   stat card 'Pending Count':
#     value pending_count
#     delta '+1.8 pts vs last week'
#     sparkline [3, 4, 6, 5, 8]
#     icon 'inbox'

steps.name: Stat cards use value, delta, sparkline, and icon
